sub_modules.butterfly_unit: Combinational radix-2 butterfly unit computing two complex outputs from inputs and twiddle factors.
sub_modules.twiddle_rom: Combinational ROM storing Q1.15 twiddle cosine and sine values for N=16 IFFT.
sub_modules.bit_rev: Combinational module reversing bits of a 4-bit index for final output reordering.
